events.title: Fuel stop — Wegmans?
events.thought: The Navigator is very soft. Probably too soft for whats ahead. Ten kilometers from launch ... and he is already stopping for food.
events.photoCaption: One last stop before saying goodbye to Wegmans until the fall.

events.title: Camp — East Harbor
events.thought: Too much pavement. Too many cars. Need to find some gravel on the way north. Soon.
events.status: above 32C all day. too hot. where is the Arctic?
